title: tephrosia leucosericea
intro: Tephrosia leucosericea, also known as white sericeous horsefly, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia leucosericea can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and extracts, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
